pi_items.source: Downloaded image and analyzed with PIL and numpy
RGB to HSV conversion analysis of downloaded image

pi_items.verified_value: Verifier checks for >= 10% relative increase OR >= 0.05 absolute increase
4 criteria: (1) Saturation increased meaningfully, (2) Hue preserved, (3) Not oversaturated, (4) Image modified
vibrant_colors.jpg (primary), with fallback to vibrant_colors.png, vibrant_colors.jpeg, landscape_enhanced.jpg, landscape_nature_enhanced.jpg, landscape_nature_saturated.jpg
pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_saturation_task.sh line 27 and verifier.py lines 152-159

privileged_info_summary: The saturation_boost@1 task operates on a real landscape photograph from Unsplash (ID: photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4) with dimensions 800x533 pixels and mean saturation of 0.302 (neutral/muted). The verifier uses HSV color space analysis to check for meaningful saturation increases (≥10% relative or ≥0.05 absolute), requiring 3 out of 4 criteria to be met for a passing score of 75+. Expected output file is vibrant_colors.jpg. The underlying Unsplash image is confirmed to exist and be loadable.
